title: rbac — background jobs
description: Five jobs. One seeds default roles on tenant provisioning. One reconciles role_definitions against the shipped catalogue on deploy. One purges expired role assignments every hour. One invalidates the permission cache in bulk (used after seeder-driven re-provisioning). One hard-deletes soft-deleted roles past retention.

jobs.purpose: Provision the default role set for a newly-created tenant. Dispatched by the TenantProvisioned listener. Reads role_definitions matching the tenant's business_type + min_tier gate.
steps: Load tenant + business_type + tier.
Enumerate role_definitions WHERE business_type_slugs @> tenant.business_type AND min_tier <= tenant.tier AND application_id = tenant.application_id.
For each definition: UPSERT role in `roles` (is_system=true, application_id + tenant_id set).
For each definition.default_permissions[]: verify permission exists in the catalogue; attach via role_has_permissions.
Fire TenantDefaultRolesSeeded once with aggregated counts.
Warm PermissionCacheManager for the tenant's initial owner user (if provided in the event payload).
jobs.uniqueVia: tenant_id (one seed in-flight per tenant at a time)

jobs.purpose: Nightly reconciliation of role_definitions against `data/role-catalogue.json`. Fixes drift when the catalogue has been updated but `rbac:sync-role-definitions` wasn't run in the deploy pipeline.
steps: Load `data/role-catalogue.json`.
For each entry: UPSERT into role_definitions.
For each row in role_definitions NOT in the catalogue: mark is_active=false (do NOT delete — tenants may still reference it).
Emit `stackra.rbac.role_definitions.drift` metric with (upserted, marked_inactive) counts.
Log a warn-level entry when drift count > 0 so ops sees deploy-pipeline gaps.

jobs.purpose: Hourly cadence. Removes `model_has_roles` rows past their `expires_at` and fires RoleAssignmentExpired per removal.
steps: SELECT id FROM model_has_roles WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now() LIMIT 5000.
For each row: DELETE inside a transaction + fire RoleAssignmentExpired.
The event's listener chain invalidates the affected principal's permission cache + dispatches RoleRevokedNotification.
Emit `stackra.rbac.assignments.expired` metric with the batch count.
Recurse if batch was 5000.

jobs.purpose: Bulk cache invalidation. Dispatched after seeder-driven mass mutations (e.g. `rbac:seed-defaults` re-run for every tenant) so the cache doesn't lag behind DB state longer than the natural TTL.
steps: Enumerate cache keys matching the invalidation pattern (per rbac:cache-key-patterns).
Batched delete in 1000-key chunks (guard against KEYS scan on large deployments).
Broadcast invalidation events per (tenant_id, principal_id) tuple so other nodes evict.
Fire PermissionCacheInvalidated with aggregated key count.

jobs.purpose: Daily cadence. Hard-deletes `roles` rows past their 90-day soft-delete retention. Runs AFTER model_has_roles rows have cascade-deleted (FK CASCADE on role delete).
steps: SELECT id FROM roles WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at < now() - INTERVAL '90 days' LIMIT 1000.
For each row: verify zero rows in model_has_roles (should be zero due to CASCADE) + hard DELETE.
Emit `stackra.rbac.roles.hard_deleted` metric.
